title: Device Forensics: Citrix NetScaler — Live CLI
description: NS-PERIM-01 was hit by a CVE-2023-3519-family exploit chain — Gateway RCE → webshell drop → rogue admin → exposed internal pivot. Connect to the device, run real nscli, reconstruct the chain.

hints.text: `connect ns-perim-01`. Start with `show system user` — anything outside nsroot / noc-readonly is suspect.
`show httpaccess | include POST` and `show httpaccess | include logon/themes` together tell the initial-RCE-to-webshell story.
`show vserver` — one VS exposes a backend service on a port a perimeter device should never bridge. `show ns log | include lb vserver` confirms who added it.
